case_title: JOEL TATE VS. JANICE SULLIVAN et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TATE, JOEL AS TO DEFENDANT SULLIVAN, JANICE DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF TATE, JOEL AS TO DEFENDANT SULLIVAN, JANICE
DECLARATION TO CLARIFY DEFENDANT'S TENANCY IS NOT SUBJECT TO SF RENT BOARD FILED BY PLAINTIFF TATE, JOEL

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TATE, JOEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SULLIVAN, JANICE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: DEFENDANT VACATED ON 1/3/10 $4,660.00 RENT, $295.05 COSTS, $233.00 HOLDOVER DAMAGES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,188.05, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF TATE, JOEL AS TO DEFENDANT SULLIVAN, JANICE

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT SULLIVAN, JANICE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TATE, JOEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SULLIVAN, JANICE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 128 HARKNESS AVE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94134, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
